value.found_quote: We added support for environment variables and improved how memory carries through a session.
value.rationale: The claim is that Google offers "Jules memory." The page describes Jules and explicitly mentions improving "how memory carries through a session," indicating Jules has a memory capability. While the page does not use the framing "Project Jitro" or "persistent agentic workspace," it does substantiate that Jules has memory functionality that is shipped to users (active). Note: the elaborate claim text about "Project Jitro (Jules V2)" and a "persistent agentic workspace with goals, insights, and history" is not described on this page; only the session-memory aspect is supported.
